Foundation ownership vs control — conservative Foundation-owned read first, then broader control/provenance blocs

This section now separates Foundation-owned voting power from votes routed by protocol-managed products or large unlabeled wallets. The blocs below are useful for influence mapping, but they are not automatically counted as Foundation-owned.

Voting power by bloc

Share is shown against recent median weekly veAERO voted, so this is a practical market-size comparison rather than total token supply.

Latest settled vote distribution

Top 6 voted pools per bloc for the latest settled epoch snapshot used in the attribution work.
Bloc veAERO % of recent median weekly veAERO voted Ownership read Known addresses Management / inventory mix

Scenario calculator — estimate emission share, AERO returned, and pool APR across 4 assumptions

Enter a weekly bribe and competing market size. Each card estimates the pool's share of weekly AERO emissions, then annualizes the projected AERO emissions against Pool TVL as pool APR.
·
Naive (your-sheet model)
estimated emission / vote share
—
pool APR from AERO emissions
—
Assumes emissions follow bribe market share one-for-one.
Empirical 55.6% (data-grounded)
estimated emission / vote share
—
pool APR from AERO emissions
—
Uses the same bribe share, then scales it by observed bribed-pool vote capture.
Capacity-bound (1.5× risk premium)
estimated emission / vote share
—
pool APR from AERO emissions
—
Limits capture by how much veAERO the bribe can realistically buy at the target $/veAERO rate.
Market-impact KL/logit
estimated emission / vote share
—
pool APR from AERO emissions
—
Simulates voters reallocating from the historical vote distribution toward higher bribes, with inertia.

Historical scenario benchmarks

Dots are real pool-weeks in the selected date range. Highlighted dots are the pools selected in the table; diamond markers are the current calculator outputs at the entered bribe size.
